global_physarum_pheromone._role: PERSISTENT private pheromone/chemistry trail (NOT shared with pointsRender's visual trail). rgb=deposited color, a=deposited alpha. decayTrail multiplies by persistence (1-decay), copy blits it to the write buffer, deposit additively scatters agent pheromones into it (drawMode:'points', blend:true → Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize from xyzTex dims), the agent pass senses it (luminance) at three sensor positions. Reads its own prior 'global_' output so it persists frame-to-frame (runtime double-buffers/ping-pongs; reference 04 §10.2/§10.7). NOT an isStateSurface (no _xyz/_vel/_rgba suffix, no 'state') but feedback read+write of the same key keeps it alive.

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([x, y, heading(rad), alive], positions normalized [0,1]). Produced upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize); updated in place by the agent pass MRT (outputXyz alias). vertex stage of deposit Loads pos.xy (clip = pos.xy*2-1) and pos.w (alive cull). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_xyz') → end-of-frame bindings persist (no swap).

global_vel._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([0, 0, age, seed]). Produced by pointsEmit; updated by the agent pass MRT (outputVel alias); vel.w=seed seeds dead-agent heading init, vel.z=age accumulates +0.016/frame. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_vel').

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([r, g, b, a] agent color from pointsEmit). Passed through by the agent pass MRT (outputRgba alias); rgb/a read by the deposit vertex stage and scaled by deposit. isStateSurface=true (suffix '_rgba').

feedback._comment: Agent-based multi-pass slime-mold sim (hardest tier: MRT state, points-scatter deposit, feedback). State lives in PERSISTENT 'global_' surfaces. global_xyz/global_vel/global_rgba (rgba32f) are agent state-surfaces created upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize) and matched by isStateSurface (suffix '_xyz'/'_vel'/'_rgba') → end-of-frame bindings persist with NO swap (particles continue from last frame). The agent pass writes all three via MRT (drawBuffers:3). global_physarum_pheromone (rgba16f, full-res, private) is the chemistry feedback surface: decayTrail multiplies by persistence (program 'diffuse', no blur), copy blits it to the post-swap write buffer (program 'passthrough'), deposit additively scatters agent pheromones into it (drawMode:'points', blend:true resolves to Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize derived from xyzTex dims), the agent pass senses it. The final passthrough copies the pipeline input to outputTex. The deposit pass is drawn as DrawProcedural(Points, count); the vertex stage Loads agent state and emits one 1px point per alive agent (clip = pos.xy*2-1, no Y flip; D3D points = 1px matching reference gl_PointSize=1). No '_iteration' uniform; no repeat. resetState (injected 1/0) clears the pheromone in decayTrail.
